mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, token_id, account_id, token_hash, expires_time, revoked_time, token_status
mapper.select: select from refresh_tokens where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from refresh_tokens where token_id = #{tokenId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from refresh_tokens
order by id desc

select from refresh_tokens
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into refresh_tokens (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, token_id, account_id, token_hash, expires_time, revoked_time, token_status) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{tokenId}, #{accountId}, #{tokenHash}, #{expiresTime}, #{revokedTime}, #{tokenStatus})

insert into refresh_tokens (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, token_id, account_id, token_hash, expires_time, revoked_time, token_status) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.tokenId}, #{item.accountId}, #{item.tokenHash}, #{item.expiresTime}, #{item.revokedTime}, #{item.tokenStatus})
mapper.update: update refresh_tokens set account_id = #{accountId}, token_hash = #{tokenHash}, expires_time = #{expiresTime}, revoked_time = #{revokedTime}, token_status = #{tokenStatus}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update refresh_tokens set account_id = #{accountId}, token_hash = #{tokenHash}, expires_time = #{expiresTime}, revoked_time = #{revokedTime}, token_status = #{tokenStatus}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where token_id = #{tokenId}

update.foreach: update refresh_tokens set account_id = #{item.accountId}, token_hash = #{item.tokenHash}, expires_time = #{item.expiresTime}, revoked_time = #{item.revokedTime}, token_status = #{item.tokenStatus}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where token_id = #{item.tokenId}
